items: Built and shipped Laravel features, feature ports, refactors, and bug fixes across multiple client repositories, often moving scoped backend work to production within a week
Designed Nuxt.js migration architecture with reusable composables, API/form abstractions, and shared UI patterns for rapid legacy Vue page migration
Migrated Telegram bot from JavaScript to TypeScript with Playwright coverage, eliminating most type-error crashes and reducing production bug reports from 2-3 per week to about 1 every 2 weeks
Built 15+ custom Svelte/SvelteKit components for a full system revamp
Contributed to a CRUD Generator that shortened admin page scaffolding by turning repeated list/form patterns into reusable templates
Built and maintained 6 shipping and marketplace integrations (J&T, NinjaVan, ParcelHub, Shopee, Lazada, Zalora) powering daily order operations for 20+ B2B SaaS clients
Built a real-time Facebook Live sales dashboard: webhooks ingested order events, while WebSockets pushed live revenue and order counts during broadcasts
